title: Past Events
content: Past Events National Science Day Symposium 2026 Academic Visit of Prof. Ramesh Katam (FAMU, USA) to Jaypee university of information Technology: August 11-12, 2025 Report on Cervical Cancer Session: March, 21, 2025 Report of 4th National Science Day Symposium (NSDS) - 2025 National Space Day Celebration Report: 23rd August 2024. 4th National Workshop on Statistical Techniques in Biological,Computational and Medical Sciences (STBMS) Third National Science Day Symposium (NSDS), February, 2024 Webinar on "Application of Bioinformatics in Healthcare" by Prof. Tiratha Raj Singh, 12th June, 2023 Second National Science Day Symposium (NSDS) - 2023 National Mathematics Day (NMD) - 2022 DST and DBT Sponsored Third National Workshop on Statistical Techniques on Biological and Medical Sciences (STBMS) June 17-23, 2022 National Science Day Symposium (NSDS-22): 28.02.2022 Virtual symposium entitled ‘National Science Day Symposium (NSDS-22)’ at Jaypee University of Information Technology (JUIT), Waknaghat, in association with Himachal Pradesh Council for Science Technology and Environment (HIMCOSTE), Government of Himachal Pradesh India on 28th Feb 2022. National Mathematics Day (NMD-2021): 22.12.2021 Virtual symposium entitled ‘National Mathematics Day (NMD-2021)’ at Jaypee University of Information Technology (JUIT), Waknaghat, in association with Himachal Pradesh Council for Science Technology and Environment (HIMCOSTE), Government of Himachal Pradesh India on 22th Dec 2021. International Webinar Series (IWS): Season II International Webinar Series (IWS): Season 2: Session 4: 18.12.2021 International Webinar Series (IWS) entitled “Containersation & DevOps Practices for Bioinformaticians” by Mr. Satyam Kapoor, Cloud Infrastructure Engineer, Sitecore, Belgium on 18th Nov 2021. International Webinar Series (IWS): Season 2: Session 3: 20.11.2021 International Webinar Series (IWS) entitled “FuSe: A tool for functional analysis of RNA-Seq data” by Dr. Rajinder Gupta, Emmy Noether Group for Computational Microbiome Research, Technical University of Munich, Germany on 20th Nov 2021. International Webinar Series (IWS): Season 2: Session 2: 09.10.2021 International Webinar Series (IWS) entitled “Research Data Management and FAIR Principles for Healthcare Data” on Research and Technological Advancements in Bioinformatics" by Dr. Gurnoor Singh, Center for Molecular and Biomolecular Informatics, Radboud UMC, Nijmegen, Netherlands on 9th Oct 2021. International Webinar Series (IWS): Season 2: Session 1: 11.09.2021 International Webinar Series (IWS) entitled “AI platform to catalog unconventional stress proteins for deep exploration of space" by Dr. Ankush Bansal, Centre for Neuroscience Research, Children's National Hospital, Washington DC, USA on 11th September, 2021. Alumni Talk : 15.09.2021 Alumni talk by Dr. Ira Vashisth entitled "CRISPR/Cas Systems- A powerful tool for crop improvement" on 15th Sept. 2021. International Webinar Series (IWS): Season 2 International Webinar Series (IWS): Season I International Webinar on "Multi-Modal Data Integration in Biomedicine" By: Prof. Holger Fröhlich, Department of Bioinformatics, Fraunhofer SCAI, Germany, 12th January, 2021. International Webinar on "Longitudinal Modeling of Alzheimer's Disease using Machine Learning Methods " By: Ms. Meemansa Sood, Bonn University, Germany, 07th December, 2020. International Webinar on "Clinical Bioinformatics: Bridging the Gateway to Precision Medicine " By: Dr. Dipankar Sen Gupta, Queens University Belfast, Northern Ireland, UK 06th November, 2020. International Webinar on "E Waste and Health Care" By: Prof. Sudhir Kumar, HoD, Department of Biotechnology and Bioinformatics, JUIT, Solan, India, 09th October, 2020, 11:00 AM IST. Press Release and YouTube Link of International Webinar on "Flexible Sensors for Biomedical Applications" By: Prof. Yosi Shacham Diamand, Tel Aviv University, Israel. International Webinar on "Flexible Sensors for Biomedical Applications" By: Prof. Yosi Shacham Diamand, Tel Aviv University, Israel, 08th September, 2020, 12:30 PM IST. JUIT signed a memorandum of understanding (MoU) with the Indian Council of Medical Research (ICMR) supported Centre for Innovation and Bio-Design of PGI, Chandigarh International Webinar on "Healthcare Status, Challenges and Current Technological Solutions" By: Prof. Vinod Kumar, VC, JUIT Detecting False Discovery Rates in Proteogenomics on 10th August, 2019 CEHTI Logo Design Competition National Workshop on Bioinformatics and Biomedical Image Analysis NBBIA-2019: 29 May - 31 May, 2019 Organized an invited talk on the topic "Radioisotopes in medicine and research" on 14th Dec., 2018
